'''thazazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldspeak|oldspeak]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldspeak|oldspeak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| thazazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæzæzhæth|thæzæzhæth]] || [[word:thæzæzhæj|thæzæzhæj]] || [[word:thæzæzhæsh|thæzæzhæsh]] || [[word:thæzæzhæ|thæzæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazazazhath|thazazazhath]] || [[word:thazazazhaj|thazazazhaj]] || [[word:thazazazhash|thazazazhash]] || [[word:thazazazha|thazazazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazazhath|thazazhath]] || [[word:thazazhaj|thazazhaj]] || [[word:thazazhash|thazazhash]] || [[word:thazazha|thazazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazafzhath|thazafzhath]] || [[word:thazafzhaj|thazafzhaj]] || [[word:thazafzhash|thazafzhash]] || [[word:thazafzhaf|thazafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thazazhatha|thazazhatha]] || [[word:thazazhaja|thazazhaja]] || [[word:thazazhasha|thazazhasha]] || [[word:thazazhaka|thazazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thazazhath|thazazhath]] || [[word:thazazhaj|thazazhaj]] || [[word:thazazhash|thazazhash]] || [[word:thazazha|thazazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thazazhathal|thazazhathal]] || [[word:thazazhajal|thazazhajal]] || [[word:thazazhashal|thazazhashal]] || [[word:thazazhakal|thazazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thazazhathatha|thazazhathatha]] || [[word:thazazhajaja|thazazhajaja]] || [[word:thazazhashasha|thazazhashasha]] || [[word:thazazhaka|thazazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thazazhathan|thazazhathan]] || [[word:thazazhajan|thazazhajan]] || [[word:thazazhashan|thazazhashan]] || [[word:thazazhakan|thazazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thazazhathaoro|thazazhathaoro]] || [[word:thazazhajaoro|thazazhajaoro]] || [[word:thazazhashaoro|thazazhashaoro]] || [[word:thazazhakaoro|thazazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
